name: PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a tour operator company in Indonesia. It offers tour and travel packages, tour guides, and tour transportation related services to foreign tourists. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk is a subsidiary of PT. Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk.
